message.content:
Subject: Formal Complaint Regarding Late and Damaged Package

Dear [Company Name] Customer Service Team,

I am writing to formally express my dissatisfaction with the recent delivery of a package that was both late and damaged. I hope this email finds you well.

On [insert date], I placed an order for [insert product name or order number] from your company. The package was scheduled to arrive by [insert expected delivery date], but it did not arrive until [insert actual delivery date], which is two weeks later than anticipated. This significant delay has caused me considerable inconvenience and disruption to my plans.

Furthermore, upon receiving the package, I immediately noticed that it was damaged. The product was not in its original condition, and the packaging was visibly compromised. I immediately contacted your customer service department to report the issue, but I have yet to receive a satisfactory response or resolution.

I expect that as a reputable company, you would take the matter of customer satisfaction seriously. The delay in delivery, combined with the damage to the product, has not only affected my experience but has also resulted in additional costs and inconvenience.

I kindly request that you take the following steps to resolve this issue:

1. Provide a full refund for the damaged product.
2. Offer a replacement or repair for the damaged item.
3. Issue a formal apology for the delay and the damage.
4. Implement a process to prevent such issues from occurring in the future.

I would appreciate it if you could respond to this email within [insert reasonable timeframe, e.g., 7 business days] and provide a clear plan of action. If you are unable to resolve the issue promptly, I will have no choice but to escalate this matter to a higher authority or seek further recourse.

Please contact me directly at [your phone number] or [your email address] if you need any additional information or documentation to assist with this complaint.

Thank you for your attention to
